name: HEGO - Enrichment Pipeline
description: Extracts entities (countries, organizations, persons) from filtered articles and enriches them before indexing. Sends CTI-relevant articles to OpenCTI as reports.

instructions.title: {{ title }}
instructions.countries: {% assign text = title | append: ' ' | append: description %}{% if text contains 'Russia' or text contains 'Russian' %}Russia,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'Ukraine' or text contains 'Ukrainian' %}Ukraine,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'China' or text contains 'Chinese' %}China,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'Taiwan' or text contains 'Taiwanese' %}Taiwan,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'Iran' or text contains 'Iranian' %}Iran,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'North Korea' or text contains 'DPRK' %}North Korea,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'Israel' or text contains 'Israeli' %}Israel,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'Palestine' or text contains 'Palestinian' %}Palestine,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'Syria' or text contains 'Syrian' %}Syria,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'Libya' or text contains 'Libyan' %}Libya,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'Turkey' or text contains 'Turkish' %}Turkey,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'NATO' %}NATO,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'United States' or text contains 'U.S.' or text contains 'American' %}United States,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'France' or text contains 'French' %}France,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'United Kingdom' or text contains 'British' or text contains 'UK' %}United Kingdom,{% endif %}
instructions.organizations: {% assign text = title | append: ' ' | append: description %}{% if text contains 'NATO' %}NATO,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'United Nations' or text contains 'UN' %}United Nations,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'European Union' or text contains 'EU' %}European Union,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'CISA' %}CISA,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'ANSSI' %}ANSSI,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'Pentagon' %}Pentagon,{% endif %}{% if text contains 'Kremlin' %}Kremlin,{% endif %}
instructions.is_cti: {% assign text = title | append: ' ' | append: description %}{% if text contains 'APT' or text contains 'malware' or text contains 'ransomware' or text contains 'CVE' or text contains 'exploit' or text contains 'vulnerability' or text contains 'phishing' or text contains 'C2' or text contains 'indicator' %}true{% else %}false{% endif %}

payload.query: mutation CreateReport($input: ReportAddInput!) { reportAdd(input: $input) { id name } }
